en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 30

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 30
Top Question of the Week
When will more information be released on the first stage of governance mechanics for DIGITALAX?
The DIGITALAX governance forum is now live at gov.digitalax.xyz . We have started proposals across four key categories during phase one, underwriting key parts of the ecosystem;
Inter DAO Web3 Fashion Collaborations
Wayfare DAO & Squad Inclusions
GDN Weekly Designer Spotlight
GDN Purveyors Cross Functional Parties

For more information on each of these verticals, see here. A few of the first proposals will be live today in a few hours! Also, more details will be shared in a few hours on the governance mechanics between $MONA and Genesis MONA NFT holders.
Stay tuned as we enter this next really exciting stage for web3 fashion and progressive decentralisation as an entire ecosystem!
Most Common Repeat Question
DIGITALAX and Marketing? 🧐

There have been a lot of opinions on this topic and it serves for great discussion. But I’d say that is the wrong question to be asking. More importantly, a better question to ask is; what is marketing in web3 and what kind of marketing works for building a real ecosystem?

Well, it’s certainly not telegram pump and dump shills, basic paid web2 influencer and publishing media, or some other version of creating and playing in a web2 facade. Because, although that might make token go up for a little while, after some time, token will come down and stay down.

Instead, we are building value for the long term. That means cultivating community first, last, and always. It means being savvy about networks and how to build trust between members of those networks. It means party formation and decentralised coordination for greater squad wealth. And, it is also everything that we have been and continue to work on day in and day out, particularly the almost daily blog posts and updates, the always on flow of conversations on the discord, twitter and other strong community channels.
Also, $MONA governance is now live! You can start proposing on the forum and take more the expansion of our marketing reach in some tangible part, into your own hands.
Top Controversies in the Industry

Web3 is an extensible framework for creating massively multi-user, economically strong applications; and, at the heart of web3 is the essential component of governance. Web3 governance, if done right, aligns interests on a decentralised multi-jurisdictional basis and illegitimises systems that are susceptible to corporate takeover through effectively balancing the tension between decentralisation, community and creativity. Decentralised governance empowers everyone within an aligned community with autonomy and ownership; where members are able to directly contribute and receive value, using their own judgement and discretion, rather than having this be demanded by a centralised hierarchy.

Governance challenges within web3 are still rife; everything from speculative token buying for coin voting, anti-democratic leadership with too much “whale” control over a project, direct attacks from malevolent actors with misaligned intentions, to the inability to maintain engagement for reaching quorum. However, if these challenges are overcome and effectively accounted for, then the upside that DAOs are able to capture and further boost, whilst minimising the downside, over traditional organisations is absolutely tremendous.

A real DAO is a global, passionate on-demand community that is formed around a motivating and overarching just cause. It’s an incredible mutli-faceted talent source for min-maxing squad wealth, whilst keeping self sovereignty for each member and thus leveraging P2P networks to catalyse what otherwise would not be possible, or much harder to achieve if attempted alone.

Optimising governance within communities and DAOs is not just a matter of using some “decentralised tech tools”. It can be easy to simplify them into a few easy steps, but frankly, building a real DAO means using the tech as a feature; not a roadmap, step by step guide or trajectory reference. Because, after all, it is the members that make up the DAO that bring in, grow and circulate the value. And, as the strength of connectivity between members in the DAO continues to grow, we can remove dependency on trust in the system, allowing us to create more trust between ourselves and other people. Ultimately, the system itself truly becomes trustless.
If not, then the DAO is really a DINO— DAO In Name Only…..🤧🤮🤢
Silly Fails and Trolling

Yeah, not too much explaining to do for this one. It’s funny when web2 tone deaf boomers think that a translucent web3 wrapping over web2 works. Because, it really doesn’t….. I mean, even the name, “world coin”….that calls for a galaxy brain meme of just not getting it 😆😂😑
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
When will more information be released على ال first stage من حوكمة mechanics لـ DIGITALAX?
ال DIGITALAX حوكمة forum is now live at gov.digitalax.xyz . We have started proposals across four key categories during phase one, underwriting key parts من ال النظام;

Stay tuned as we enter this next really exciting stage لـ web3 فاشون و progressive decentralisation as an entire النظام!
Most Common Repeat سؤال
DIGITALAX و Marketing? 🧐

There have been a lot من opinions على this topic و it serves لـ great discussion. But I’d say that is ال wrong سؤال الى be asking. More importantly, a better سؤال الى ask is; what is marketing في web3 و what kind من marketing works لـ building a real النظام?

Well, it’s certainly not telegram pump و dump shills, basic paid web2 influencer و publishing media, or some other version من creating و playing في a web2 facade. Because, although that might make token go up لـ a little while, after some time, token will come down و stay down.

Instead, we are building value لـ ال long term. That means cultivating المجتمع first, last, و always. It means being savvy about networks و ازاي الى build trust between members من those networks. It means party formation و decentralised coordination لـ greater squad wealth. و, it is also everything that we have been و continue الى work على day في و day out, particularly ال almost daily blog بوستات و تحديثات, ال always على flow من conversations على ال discord, twitter و other strong المجتمع channels.
Also, $MONA حوكمة is now live! You can start proposing على ال forum و take more ال expansion من our marketing reach في some tangible part, into your own hands.
Top Controversies في ال Industry

Web3 is an extensible framework لـ creating massively multi-user, economically strong applications; و, at ال heart من web3 is ال essential component من حوكمة. Web3 حوكمة, if done right, aligns interests على a decentralised multi-jurisdictional basis و illegitimises systems that are susceptible الى corporate takeover through effectively balancing ال tension between decentralisation, المجتمع و creativity. Decentralised حوكمة empowers everyone within an aligned المجتمع مع autonomy و ownership; where members are able الى directly contribute و receive value, using their own judgement و discretion, rather than having this be demanded by a centralised hierarchy.

حوكمة challenges within web3 are still rife; everything من speculative token buying لـ coin voting, anti-democratic leadership مع too much “whale” control over a project, direct attacks من malevolent actors مع misaligned intentions, الى ال inability الى maintain engagement لـ reaching quorum. However, if these challenges are overcome و effectively accounted لـ, then ال upside that DAOs are able الى capture و further boost, whilst minimising ال downside, over traditional organisations is absolutely tremendous.

A real DAO is a global, passionate على-demand المجتمع that is formed around a motivating و overarching just cause. It’s an incredible mutli-faceted talent source لـ min-maxing squad wealth, whilst keeping self sovereignty لـ each member و thus leveraging P2P networks الى catalyse what otherwise would not be possible, or much harder الى achieve if attempted alone.

Optimising حوكمة within communities و DAOs is not just a matter من using some “decentralised tech tools”. It can be easy الى simplify them into a few easy steps, but frankly, building a real DAO means using ال tech as a feature; not a roadmap, step by step guide or trajectory reference. Because, after all, it is ال members that make up ال DAO that bring في, grow و circulate ال value. و, as ال strength من connectivity between members في ال DAO continues الى grow, we can remove dependency على trust في ال system, allowing us الى create more trust between ourselves و other people. Ultimately, ال system itself truly becomes trustless.
If not, then ال DAO is really a DINO— DAO في Name Only…..🤧🤮🤢
Silly Fails و Trolling

Yeah, not too much explaining الى do لـ this one. It’s funny when web2 tone deaf boomers think that a translucent web3 wrapping over web2 works. Because, it really doesn’t….. I mean, even ال name, “world coin”….that calls لـ a galaxy brain meme من just not getting it 😆😂😑
